# Core
numpy
websockets>=12.0
onnxruntime          # Silero VAD (ONNX backend)
requests             # For downloading VAD model

# --- Pick ONE ASR backend below ---

# Apple Silicon (MLX) — recommended on Mac (NO torch required)
# pip install mlx-audio
# Default model: mlx-community/VibeVoice-ASR-4bit

# PyTorch (Linux / Windows / CUDA)
# pip install torch transformers librosa
# Default model: microsoft/VibeVoice-ASR
